creator: freebsd@schukraft.org
text:
After update to 10.3p9 xdm can't log me in anymore with this in .xsession-errors:

Protocol not supported by server                                        
Couldn't connect to :0

This was discussed on questions@ already (https://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-questions/2016-October/273854.html), the user reporting it there had the same problems I have, only for him "startx" works. For me it doesn't, I have to use xinit to get a working X.

Both he and I use nvidia-driver, but I use the current one, he uses an older one for his older graphics card, so it might not be related to drivers.
